ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual (Male/Female) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of education level */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Work class of the individual (e.g., Private, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "income_class" TEXT /* Income class of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_native_country FOREIGN KEY ("native_country") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data entry */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Hours worked per week by the individual */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the individual */,
  "work_hours_per_year" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per year by the individual */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the economic data was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the economic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_relationship FOREIGN KEY ("relationship") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_class FOREIGN KEY ("class") REFERENCES income_classes ("income_class")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, HS-grad) */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of the education level */,
  "education_category" TEXT /* Category of the education level (e.g., High School, Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Name of the work class (e.g., Private, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Adm-clerical, Exec-managerial) */,
  "occupation_category" TEXT /* Category of the occupation (e.g., Administrative, Executive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status (e.g., Not-in-family, Husband) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Name of the native country (e.g., United-States, Cuba) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_classes" (
  "income_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income class */,
  "income_class" TEXT /* Name of the income class (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_requested" TEXT /* Description of the data requested */,
  "data_retrieved" INTEGER /* Amount of data retrieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data entry */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team is working on */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the team */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the team */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the member's details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the dataset belongs to */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_datasets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes_made" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES project_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
